feature.name: pytest skipif condition evaluator
feature.description: Extract pytest skipif/xfail condition evaluation semantics as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: evaluate string conditions via compile/eval with allowed globals
merge markeval_namespace mappings into eval globals
return (result, reason) tuple with default reason for string conditions
excluded_behaviors: full skip/xfail mark application during test run
CLI, original tests, docs, packaging metadata

entanglement.description: Skipif evaluation uses dynamic eval with config, platform, and custom namespace hooks from pytest runtime.
signals: string conditions compiled at evaluation time
tied to Mark metadata but usable standalone

output.import: from featurelifted import Mark, EvalContext, evaluate_condition
output.signature: evaluate_condition(context: EvalContext, mark: Mark, condition: object) -> tuple[bool, str]
